The Root Cause

Why nothing has worked for you — yet

Your body is giving you signals. Most nutritionists hand you a calorie deficit. Sonia finds out why those signals are broken.

1
⚡
The Problem
Calories In, Calories Out Is Destroying Your Hormones
Chronic under-eating and over-exercising doesn't just fail to fix PCOS or thyroid — it actively worsens them. Cortisol spikes, oestrogen dominance, and insulin resistance all get worse when your body feels deprived. This is why you lose weight, gain it back with more, and feel worse than before.
2
🔬
The Real Reason
Your Hormones Have an Order. Nobody Has Told You What It Is.
PCOS doesn't cause weight gain. Insulin resistance does — and it causes PCOS too. The gut microbiome controls your oestrogen recycling. Thyroid markers shift based on your protein intake. These systems are interconnected. A plan that ignores this will always fail.
3
🌿
Sonia's Approach
Real Food, Ancient Wisdom, Modern Blood Science
No meal replacements. No eliminating entire food groups. Whole foods — including healthy fats, quality proteins, and nutrient-dense carbohydrates — eaten in the right sequence and proportion to support your specific hormonal profile. This is what 25 years of clinical practice actually looks like.
Speak with Sonia's team · 20 minutes · No obligation

10,000+ people. PCOS reversed. Thyroid normalised. Energy back.
Sonia's program is for you
if you have:
PCOS or PCOD +
Irregular or missed periods, severe acne, excess facial hair, thinning scalp hair, stubborn weight gain, difficulty conceiving, mood swings, anxiety, neck darkening — and medications that seem to make things worse.
Thyroid Issues or Hashimoto's / Graves' +
Unexplained weight gain or loss, persistent fatigue, hair thinning, brain fog, feeling cold or overheated, irregular cycles, puffiness — with reports that say "within range" but a body that clearly isn't.
Endometriosis or Adenomyosis +
Severe menstrual cramps, heavy or prolonged bleeding, painful intercourse, pelvic pain, bloating, back pain, nausea, constipation, and difficulty conceiving — symptoms that flare despite medication.
Perimenopause or Menopause +
Hot flashes, night sweats, disrupted sleep, mood instability, sudden weight gain around the abdomen, brain fog, low libido, dry skin — and the feeling that your body has changed overnight.
Fertility Troubles +
Difficulty conceiving despite trying, failed IVF cycles, recurrent miscarriage, irregular cycles, hormonal imbalance impacting egg quality — and a deep desire to understand what's actually going on before the next round.
Postpartum Recovery +
Postpartum hair fall, exhaustion that doesn't lift, difficulty losing baby weight, mood crashes, thyroid flare after delivery, gut issues, low milk supply — and the sense that no one is telling you what recovery really looks like.
Severe Skin or Hair Issues +
Adult acne, cystic breakouts, dull or ageing skin, hair fall that isn't stopping, scalp issues — when topical treatments haven't worked because the root is hormonal, not external.
Chronic Gut or Digestive Issues +
IBS, chronic bloating, acid reflux, constipation, diarrhoea, food intolerances that keep growing — and a gut that is directly linked to your hormonal imbalance, whether you've been told that yet or not.
Metabolic or Lifestyle Disorders +
Insulin resistance, pre-diabetes, high cholesterol, fatty liver, stubborn weight that won't move despite exercise and diet — conditions that are reversible through food when addressed at the hormonal root.

FAQ

Questions we always get

Do I need to give up Indian food or eat bland food?
+
Absolutely not — and this is exactly what makes Sonia's approach different. Her entire protocol is built around real food, including traditional Indian options: dal, sabzi, ghee, curd, roti. The focus is on when you eat, how you combine foods, and what sequence supports your specific hormonal profile. No meal replacements, no fancy supplements, no "clean eating" obsession.
I've already tried multiple programs. Why will this be different?
+
Most programs treat symptoms. Sonia works on root causes. If you have PCOS, your insulin resistance is addressed first. If you have thyroid issues, your protein timing and gut health are addressed. The difference is a 40-minute deep-dive conversation with Sonia herself at the start — which no other program in this price range offers.
How much access do I get to Sonia directly?
+
Yes — Sonia personally leads every client's case. You also get a dedicated Head Nutritionist assigned to you, trained specifically in Sonia's root-cause methodology, for guidance and support between your sessions with her. You're not handed off to a junior or a general dietitian.
What conditions does Sonia work with?
+
PCOS, hypothyroid, hyperthyroid, Hashimoto's, perimenopause, gut issues, IBS, eating disorders, hair fall, skin issues, postpartum recovery, pregnancy nutrition, fertility support, hormonal imbalance, weight loss, and more. If it has a nutritional root cause, Sonia has worked with it in her 25 years of practice.
Are there results if I'm outside India?
+
Yes — a significant portion of Sonia's clients are NRIs. All consultations are on video call. Ingredient substitutions for what's available abroad are built into your plan. The WhatsApp group works across time zones.
Private · No obligation · Just clarity on what your body actually needs
